name: iterative-default-preserves-explicit-durations
description: Two-turn iterative durations test. Turn 1 explicitly sets Facials to 60min/$50 (one of five services). Turn 2 says 'default' — bot must apply 30min/no-price defaults to the four UNADDRESSED services WITHOUT overwriting the Facials value the user already set. Earlier behavior (introduced by my own iterative-collection fix and now repaired): delegation reset all entries to default, wiping explicit values. The merge logic now consults existingByName for previously-addressed entries before falling back to default.

turns.user: Facials are for 1 hour at 50 dollars
